definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="36" y="137"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">HitResult hitResult = entity.pick(5.0D, 0.0F, false);</field><next><block type="controls_if"><mutation elseif="1"></mutation><value name="IF0"><block type="java_code_get"><field name="CODE">hitResult.getType() == HitResult.Type.ENTITY</field></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="return_string"><value name="return"><block type="text_join"><mutation items="2"></mutation><value name="ADD0"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Общие повреждения: </field></block></value><value name="ADD1"><block type="variables_get_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="true" has_entity="true"></mutation><field name="VAR">global:sscCustomHealth</field><value name="entity"><block type="java_code_get"><field name="CODE">((EntityHitResult) hitResult).getEntity()</field></block></value></block></value></block></value></block></statement><value name="IF1"><block type="java_code_get"><field name="CODE">entity.getXRot() > 75.0F</field></block></value><statement name="DO1"><block type="return_string"><value name="return"><block type="text_join"><mutation items="2"></mutation><value name="ADD0"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Общие повреждения: </field></block></value><value name="ADD1"><block type="variables_get_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="true" has_entity="true"></mutation><field name="VAR">global:ssc14_dmg_piercing</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value></block></value></block></statement><next><block type="return_string"><value name="return"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Общие повреждения: N/D</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
